<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 600; 300; 850; 2750; 8000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 1400; 600; 2600; 5000; 10000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; ; 1
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Radio Comms; Field Ops; Guerrilla Tactics; Stealth Mercenary
$FNC-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Radio Comms; Bigger Rifle; Upskill; Stealth Mercenary
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 5523212631; 5523215135; 5523216332; 5523217773
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 0.2 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 0.15 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.15 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.15 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.15 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.2 || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.15 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.1 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 0.1 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.1 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
